title: Phyllomphax galeandra
taxonomy: Phyllomphax galeandra is a genus of flowering plants in the family Acanthaceae. The species is native to tropical Africa. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and is further classified into the class Magnoliopsida. The order is Lamiales, and the family is Acanthaceae. The plant is also known by its synonym, Acanthacaulis galeandra.
